title: Edit Video
heading: Edit Video Content
subtitle: Modify the video keywords, key points, summary, transcript and enable AI Presenter.

descriptions.keywords: Add relevant keywords to help categorize and make your video more discoverable.
descriptions.keypoints: Add key points that highlight the main topics covered in your video.
descriptions.summary: Edit the video summary that provides an overview of the content.
descriptions.ai_presenter: Create an AI-powered presenter for your video that will narrate the content based on your summary and key points.
descriptions.transcript: Edit the transcript of your video to ensure content accuracy.

placeholders.summary: Write a summary of your video content...

messages.ai_presenter_info: The AI Presenter will be generated after saving. This process may take a few minutes. You will be notified when it's ready.

errors.fetch_failed: Failed to load video data. Please try again.
errors.save_failed: Failed to save changes. Please try again.
errors.presenter_generation_failed: Changes were saved, but there was an issue generating the AI Presenter. The team has been notified.

auth.login_message: You need to login to edit video content.
